name: grounded-coding
description: Grounded coding environment — graph-powered code intelligence, TDD discipline, and verification gates for Claude Code

hooks.prompt: Evaluate this Bash command for destructive operations. Block if it contains any of: git reset --hard, git checkout -- ., git clean -f, rm -rf on project directories, --no-verify, --no-gpg-sign, git push --force to main or master. Allow if the user explicitly requested the destructive operation. Return JSON: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"permissionDecision": "allow"}} or {"hookSpecificOutput": {"permissionDecision": "deny"}, "systemMessage": "reason"}

hooks.statusMessage: Rust verification: fmt, check, clippy, test
